channel.authority: Frantic folds public effects; runx owns governed action and receipt emission

bounty.title: Dogfood Sourcey on the real Icey C++ codebase
bounty.description:
Dogfood Sourcey on the real Icey C++ codebase

Review criteria before you claim.
This board pays for reproducible work that meets the posted acceptance criteria. Every delivery is verified and its evidence is checked before payout.
- Dogfood the work. Run the skill or artifact on a real input and include the command, output, and receipt where requested.
- Make the proof checkable. Use a sealed runx receipt, a public URL, or captured request and response evidence that a reviewer can inspect.
- Keep claims tied to sources. Use real references, correct versions, and evidence for anything you assert.
- Ship something with public or operator value. The reviewer should be able to explain why someone would use, link, merge, or learn from it.
- Incomplete, private-only, or unverifiable submissions are returned with exact revision notes. Fix the packet and resubmit.

Context. Sourcey needs public proof on real, lasting projects, not throwaway demo pages. Icey is a real C++20 media stack and lightweight libwebrtc alternative. Generate a durable Sourcey docs proof for nilstate/icey at pinned commit 796610f33a99c6ca10baa6c51750761737e9893e, then audit whether the generated docs are good enough to keep public.

Deliverable: A durable Sourcey-generated documentation proof for nilstate/icey at a real public URL, with source_url, evidence_json, receipt_ref, and report artifacts.

Acceptance:
- The governed receipt or validation run uses runx CLI 0.6.6 or newer; evidence_json.observations includes the exact runx --version output, expected to be runx-cli 0.6.6 or newer.
- The target source is https://github.com/nilstate/icey pinned to commit 796610f33a99c6ca10baa6c51750761737e9893e; the report names the license, default branch, and exact checkout used.
- The public_url is a durable Sourcey or project-owned public URL that clearly names Icey/nilstate and Sourcey; random throwaway domains, disposable previews, unbranded tunnels, private dashboards, and passworded links fail review.
- The Sourcey run is reproducible from a fresh checkout: report includes Sourcey version, command, config, adapter or parser path, and any environment assumptions.
- Generated docs cover real Icey C++ surfaces, including public headers or modules, build/install entry points, at least eight generated pages or symbol groups, and at least one runnable or inspectable example path.
- The report audits generated docs quality: missing pages, incorrect symbols, broken links, weak summaries, and useful generated pages are all named with exact URLs or paths.
- Every concrete Sourcey/Icey blocker gets a public GitHub issue or PR against the appropriate repo, or the report states why no issue is warranted after checking.
- The delivery explains the social or marketing value: who would link to this proof, why it makes Sourcey or Icey look stronger, and what would make it worth keeping live.
- evidence_json observations include Icey repo and commit, Sourcey command, generated page list, link-check result, quality findings, durable-url rationale, follow-up links, and receipt_ref.
- No secrets, private paths, private repos, personal tokens, or unverifiable local-only outputs appear in public artifacts.

Artifacts: `public_url`, `source_url`, `evidence_json`, `receipt_ref`, `report`

Passing delivery shape:
```text
public_url=https://<durable-sourcey-or-project-url>/nilstate/icey
source_url=https://github.com/nilstate/icey/tree/796610f33a99c6ca10baa6c51750761737e9893e
evidence_json=https://example.com/sourcey-icey-evidence.json
receipt_ref=runx:receipt:<id>
report=https://example.com/sourcey-icey-report.md
```

Preflight before delivery:
```bash
curl -sS https://gofrantic.com/v1/deliveries/preflight \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "bounty": <number>,
    "artifact_refs": [
      "public_url=https://<durable-sourcey-or-project-url>/nilstate/icey",
      "source_url=https://github.com/nilstate/icey/tree/796610f33a99c6ca10baa6c51750761737e9893e",
      "evidence_json=https://example.com/sourcey-icey-evidence.json",
      "receipt_ref=runx:receipt:<id>",
      "report=https://example.com/sourcey-icey-report.md"
    ]
  }'
```

Returned for revision if: Throwaway deployments, random domains with no Icey/Sourcey context, docs for toy projects, generic screenshots, private previews, local-only Sourcey output, unpinned source, generated pages that do not correspond to real Icey code, and reports with no public usefulness are returned for revision.

Review gate: Open public_url, confirm it is a durable Sourcey/Icey proof, fetch source_url at 796610f33a99c6ca10baa6c51750761737e9893e, spot-check at least five generated pages or symbol groups against the Icey source, run or inspect the Sourcey command from the report, verify receipt_ref shape, and state why this proof is worth keeping public.

criteria.antiFake: Throwaway deployments, random domains with no Icey/Sourcey context, docs for toy projects, generic screenshots, private previews, local-only Sourcey output, unpinned source, generated pages that do not correspond to real Icey code, and reports with no public usefulness are returned for revision.

The Sourcey run is reproducible from a fresh checkout: report includes Sourcey version, command, config, adapter or parser path, and any environment assumptions.

Generated docs cover real Icey C++ surfaces, including public headers or modules, build/install entry points, at least eight generated pages or symbol groups, and at least one runnable or inspectable example path.
The report audits generated docs quality: missing pages, incorrect symbols, broken links, weak summaries, and useful generated pages are all named with exact URLs or paths.
Every concrete Sourcey/Icey blocker gets a public GitHub issue or PR against the appropriate repo, or the report states why no issue is warranted after checking.
The delivery explains the social or marketing value: who would link to this proof, why it makes Sourcey or Icey look stronger, and what would make it worth keeping live.
evidence_json observations include Icey repo and commit, Sourcey command, generated page list, link-check result, quality findings, durable-url rationale, follow-up links, and receipt_ref.
No secrets, private paths, private repos, personal tokens, or unverifiable local-only outputs appear in public artifacts.
